channel.title: Azure Migration Monitor
channel.description: Azure storage migration queries with suggested responses.

item.title: Reddit r/azure: How to migrate on-prem file server to Azure Files?
item.description:
Source: Reddit r/azure
Question: How to migrate on-prem file server to Azure Files?
We have about 5TB on our file server. What is the best approach?
---
Suggested Response: Use AzCopy to migrate to Azure Files. Docs: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/storage/common/storage-use-azcopy-v10
